summary: Comprehensive testing of P&L Chart X-axis fix. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 visual tests passed. All requested features verified working correctly - chart now shows MM/DD HH:MM format when data spans >18 hours, tooltip shows full UTC datetime, header shows 'last close' timestamp, and data is consistent across endpoints.

backend_pnl_history_tests: Response contains 'latest_close_at' field (non-null ISO timestamp: 2026-03-17T00:19:50.548733+00:00) - PASS
Each point has full ISO timestamp format (e.g., 2026-03-07T21:55:58.316833+00:00) - PASS
Response contains all expected fields (points, current_pnl, peak_pnl, trough_pnl, max_drawdown, total_trades, close_trades, latest_close_at, server_time) - PASS
backend_timestamp_range_tests: Data spans March 7-17 (>240 hours, well above 18-hour threshold for MM/DD HH:MM format) - PASS
frontend_visual_tests: P&L chart header shows 'last close 03/17 00:20 UTC' - PASS
X-axis shows MM/DD HH:MM format (03/07 21:59, 03/09 21:55, etc.) because data spans >18 hours - PASS
Tooltip shows '03/16 20:34 UTC' with full date+time+timezone - PASS
Stat cards show: Daily PnL +$45.39, Win Rate 54.4%, Closed Trades 397 - PASS
Diagnostics footer visible showing emergent_preview, test_database@localhost:27017, db-reload:on - PASS

features_verified.Backend: GET /api/analytics/pnl-history: PASS - Returns non-null ISO timestamp when close_trades > 0
features_verified.Backend: PnL history points have timesta: PASS - All points have full ISO timestamps (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.microseconds+00:00)
features_verified.Frontend: X-axis shows MM/DD HH:MM when: PASS - Data spans March 7-17, X-axis shows 03/07 21:59, 03/09 21:55, etc.
features_verified.Frontend: Tooltip shows full UTC datetim: PASS - Shows '03/16 20:34 UTC P&L: +$127.99 Trade: $-7.58 resolver'
features_verified.Frontend: Overview stat cards show non-z: PASS - Daily PnL +$45.39, Win Rate 54.4%, Closed Trades 397
features_verified.Frontend: Diagnostics footer visible: PASS - Shows emergent_preview, test_database@localhost:27017, boot time, loaded trades, db-reload:on

code_verification.PnlChart.jsx formatChartTime: Uses UTC methods (getUTCHours, getUTCMinutes) - returns HH:MM
code_verification.PnlChart.jsx formatChartDate: Uses UTC methods (getUTCMonth, getUTCDate, getUTCHours, getUTCMinutes) - returns MM/DD HH:MM
code_verification.PnlChart.jsx buildTickFormatter: Auto-switches: if range > 18 hours uses formatChartDate, else formatChartTime
code_verification.PnlChart.jsx lastCloseLabel: Displays latest_close_at with ' UTC' suffix in chart header
code_verification.PnlChart.jsx CustomTooltip: Shows formatChartDate(timestamp) + ' UTC' for full datetime
code_verification.dashboardStore.js pnlHistory default: Includes latest_close_at: null and server_time: null fields
code_verification.server.py /api/analytics/pnl-history: Returns latest_close_at (last close trade timestamp) and server_time (current UTC)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (2655 total trades, 396-397 closed trades spanning March 7-17)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P&L chart X-axis fix features verified: (1) Backend returns latest_close_at and server_time in /api/analytics/pnl-history. (2) All timestamps are full ISO format with date. (3) Frontend chart header shows 'last close MM/DD HH:MM UTC'. (4) X-axis shows MM/DD HH:MM format because data spans March 7-17 (>18 hours). (5) Tooltip shows full 'MM/DD HH:MM UTC' format. (6) Data consistency verified across endpoints. Trade counts may vary slightly as bot is live trading.
